g.text: MACENA CS2 COACH AI · DATA PIPELINE
25-dim Feature Vector — lifecycle from .dem to tensor
Single source of truth: vectorizer.py · FEATURE_NAMES tuple · METADATA_DIM=25 · P-X-01
DOWNSTREAM — tensor storage → batch assembly → model input
JSON array per tick · FK → match
Changes to feature order or normalization MUST be made in vectorizer.py ONLY. P-X-01
round_won is EXCLUDED from all 25 dims — label leak prevention. Never add it.
assert len(FEATURE_NAMES) == METADATA_DIM enforced at module import
